import React from'react';import'../styles/Main.css';import logo from'../assets/logo.png';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useSearchParams}from'react-router-dom';import InputField from'../components/InputField';import{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Motivations(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[searchParams]=useSearchParams();const id=Number(searchParams.get('id'));const[recover,setRecover]=useState("");const[miss,setMiss]=useState("");const[person,setPerson]=useState("");const[remember,setRemember]=useState("");const[quote,setQuote]=useState("");const[error,setError]=useState("");async function updateRecover(){//some nlp? 
setRecover("\"I want to recover so that I can ".concat(recover,"\""));setMiss("\"I miss enjoying ".concat(miss,"\""));setPerson("\"I'm doing this for ".concat(person,"\""));setRemember("\"When things get hard, I want to remember ".concat(remember,"\""));setQuote("".concat(quote));const response=await fetch('/insert-user-quotes',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({id,recover,miss,person,remember,quote})});const result=await response.json();if(result.success){navigate('/');}else{setError('Update Failed ');}}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("link",{href:"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poltawski+Nowy:ital,wght@0,400..700;1,400..700&display=swap",rel:"Main.css"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:logo,alt:"Logo",className:"Logo"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"motivationsBox",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Motivations"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InputField,{label:"I want to recover so that I can...",value:recover,onChange:setRecover}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InputField,{label:"I miss enjoying...",value:miss,onChange:setMiss}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InputField,{label:"I'm doing this for...",value:person,onChange:setPerson}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InputField,{label:"When things get hard, I want to remember...",value:remember,onChange:setRemember}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InputField,{label:"My favourite recovery quote is...",value:quote,onChange:setQuote})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>updateRecover(),children:"next step"}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"error",children:error})]})]});}export default Motivations;
